title: Strata #14 — Floating Red Coordinates
summary: A horizontal abstract painting from the Strata 2026 series, built around a deep green territorial field, floating red geometric markers and fine incised white lines. The work suggests distance, mapping and silent movement across a constructed landscape.
concept: In Strata #14 — Floating Red Coordinates, the surface behaves like a quiet territory crossed by delicate fault lines. The red blocks appear as coordinates, signs or suspended structures placed within a green field. The work does not describe a literal landscape; it proposes a mental and geological space where direction, distance and presence remain open
commercial_note: This work belongs to the Strata 2026 series, a body of abstract paintings focused on territory, fault lines, ground frequency and the silent presence of geometric forms. Its horizontal format gives the composition a panoramic quality, making it suitable for spacious interiors, contemporary collections and architectural environments.
